Validation Rule: Policy must have owner status version and review cadence
Notes: Policy governs and must not be embedded only in procedures

Validation Rule: Standard must map to governing policy and at least one requirement
Requirement must map to a policy domain and control
Control must map to requirement evidence and test method
Notes: Control without evidence is not audit-ready

Validation Rule: Evidence must be period-bound and traceable to source system
Notes: Store attachments per enterprise records policy

Validation Rule: Risk must have rating owner treatment and relationship to controls
Notes: Architecture risk should not be hidden as informal design commentary

Validation Rule: Findings must have owner due date root cause and closure evidence
Notes: Use for audit regulatory and self-identified issues

Validation Rule: Exceptions and waivers must expire and be reviewed
Notes: Open-ended exceptions should be treated as control failures

Validation Rule: Citation must map to requirement and control where applicable
Notes: Maintain FFIEC OCC FDIC Fed NIST CIS COBIT ISO mappings

Validation Rule: Control test must tie to evidence and result
